channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: US-Israel war on Iran dramatically expands across Middle East - The Guardian
item.description:
1. US-Israel war on Iran dramatically expands across Middle East  The Guardian
  2. Live updates: Trump warns Iran about larger strikes as war spirals in Middle East  CNN
  3. Middle East crisis live: Israel launches new attacks on Tehran and Beirut as Trump lays out objectives  The Guardian
  4. Iran war live: Trump says military campaign can last longer than four weeks  Reuters
  5. Live updates: Trump says Iran operations likely to last 4 to 5 weeks, but he's prepared ‘to go far longer’  AP News

item.title: A look at some of the contenders to be Iran’s supreme leader after the killing of Khamenei - AP News
item.description:
1. A look at some of the contenders to be Iran’s supreme leader after the killing of Khamenei  AP News
  2. The C.I.A. Helped Pinpoint a Gathering of Iranian Leaders. Then Israel Struck.  The New York Times
  3. Maps and charts of the Iran crisis  Reuters
  4. Khamenei’s Wife Dies From Injuries Sustained in U.S.–Israeli Attack, State Media Says  WSJ
  5. China condemns Iran strikes, urges Gulf to oppose foreign influence  USA Today

item.title: Trump says UK's Starmer took far too long to allow use of air bases - Reuters
item.description:
1. Trump says UK's Starmer took far too long to allow use of air bases  Reuters
  2. France, Germany and U.K. Open Door to Striking Iranian Launchers  WSJ
  3. Starmer criticises Trump over Iran strikes, as he defends UK position  BBC
  4. UK ‘took far too long’ to let US use its airbases to attack Iran, Trump says  The Guardian
  5. Starmer says he will give US permission to use UK bases for Iran missions  Politico

item.title: Travel stocks fall after thousands of flights grounded following Iran strikes - CNBC
item.description:
1. Travel stocks fall after thousands of flights grounded following Iran strikes  CNBC

  3. The hole in the sky: How Middle East airspace closures are reshaping global aviation  CNN
  4. Asia airline stocks drop while energy shares rise as Iran conflict escalates  CNBC
  5. Hundreds of thousands of travelers stranded following U.S.-Israel attacks on Iran  PBS

item.title: France offers to station nuclear assets across Europe for the first time - Financial Times
item.description:
1. France offers to station nuclear assets across Europe for the first time  Financial Times
  2. France to increase its number of nuclear warheads, Macron says – as it happened  The Guardian
  3. Macron Expands French Nuclear Arsenal and Vows Protection for Neighbors  The New York Times
  4. France to boost nuclear arsenal, involve European allies in deterrence  Reuters
  5. France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies  BBC

item.title: Iran attack on giant Saudi refinery pushes up oil prices - Axios
item.description:
1. Iran attack on giant Saudi refinery pushes up oil prices  Axios

  4. Gas oil is spiking more than crude: What it is and why prices are soaring amid Operation Epic Fury  MarketWatch
  5. Iran strikes Europe for first time and hits Saudi Aramco refinery  Seeking Alpha

item.title: Starmer Faces Dilemma After British Base in Cyprus Was Hit by a Drone - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Starmer Faces Dilemma After British Base in Cyprus Was Hit by a Drone  The New York Times
  2. U.K. Believes Attack on Its Cyprus Base Came Before Starmer Allowed U.S. to Use Bases  WSJ
  3. Iranian-made drone hits British air base in Cyprus  Reuters
  4. Two drones intercepted heading for RAF base, Cyprus says  BBC
  5. Britain says it’s not at war after a drone strikes its Akrotiri base in Cyprus  Los Angeles Times

item.title: Lebanese PM bans Hezbollah’s military activities after attack on Israel - Al Jazeera
item.description: Lebanese PM bans Hezbollah’s military activities after attack on Israel  Al JazeeraView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: European military installations are targeted in Iran retaliation - Defense News
item.description:
1. European military installations are targeted in Iran retaliation  Defense News
  2. As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines  The New York Times
  3. GORDON SONDLAND: No more 'restraint': Europe must stand with America on Iran  Fox News
  4. The Iran war makes it official – America is breaking with Europe  New Statesman
  5. Trump’s Iran War Widens, Forcing Reluctant Allies to Choose  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Fourth US service member killed in action during Iran operations - Military Times
item.description:
1. Fourth US service member killed in action during Iran operations  Military Times
  2. A 4th U.S. soldier has died as the war with Iran further engulfs the region  NPR
  3. US: 'Powerful' Iranian weapon broke through defenses and killed 4 US troops  Business Insider
  4. U.S. troops killed amid Iranian counterattack, fueling air defense fears  The Washington Post
  5. Iran conflict escalates: 4 U.S. service members killed as death toll climbs  Axios

item.title: We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said. - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said.  The Washington Post
  2. Just one in four Americans say they back US strikes on Iran, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds  Reuters
  3. 6 Conservative Voters React to Attacks on Iran Ahead of the Texas Primaries  The New York Times
  4. Iran didn’t adapt to America's playbook. Russia and China already have  Fox News
  5. More Americans disapprove than approve of U.S. strikes against Iran  Ipsos

item.title: India and Canada reset ties with 'landmark' nuclear energy deal - BBC
item.description:
1. India and Canada reset ties with 'landmark' nuclear energy deal  BBC

item.title: Bagram Air Base Targeted by Pakistan, Afghanistan Says - The New York Times

item.title: Qatar shoots down two Iranian Su-24 fighter jets over airspace, defense ministry says - The Jerusalem Post

item.title: UAE Shuts Embassy in Tehran in Response to Iranian Strikes - Bloomberg.com

item.title: Joint Statement on Iran’s Missile and Drone Attacks in the Region - U.S. Department of State (.gov)
item.description:
